chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-399 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For hearing of case. 19.12.2025 Ms. Tasleem Pasha advocate for petitioner. Mr. Naveed Hussain Umrani advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General Sindh. RIAZAT ALI SAHAR. J, - The petitioner has filed instant constitutional petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan with the following prayers:- a. That this Honourable Court may be pleased to suspend/set- aside the order dated: 06.08.2025, passed, the custody of minor handed over petitioner or given all the visiting rights. b. That this Honourable Court may be pleased to pass appropriate order. c. Any other relief(s) which this Honourable Court deems fit, just and proper in favour of the petitioner. 2. Learned counsel for the parties have agreed that the order dated 13.05.2025 passed by learned Family & Guardian Judge-II, Tando Allahyar be set aside to the extent of para-20 of the order and the learned trial Court be directed to decide the same afresh after hearing the parties. 3. By consent of the parties, the aforementioned order dated 13.05.2025 is set-aside to the extent of para-20, with direction to the learned trial Court to decide the issue of meeting with the minor afresh in the light of recent cases laws after providing full opportunity of hearing to the parties and pass a fresh order within a period of one month after receipt of this Order. 4. In view of above, instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
